explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Patent documents describe the application of an AI neural network for vehicle speed management, including its role in determining stopping distances and controlling vehicle movement based on defined rules and environmental data. These documents also detail the training of the AI based on feedback.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This patent document provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. It describes the application of an AI neural network for vehicle speed management, including determining stopping distances and controlling vehicle movement based on defined rules and environmental data. The patent also details the training of the AI based on feedback, indicating established processes for governing its development and performance.
relevant_sources.title: Patents Assigned to Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Documentation describes the company's AI/ML approaches for autonomous driving, including details on algorithm training. It also references the use of data for simulation in this context.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This article discusses Wabtec's development of autonomous train technology, providing evidence for the **transparency** pillar. While it describes the company's AI/ML approaches for autonomous driving, including algorithm training and data use for simulation, it lacks specific details on execution or policies. The article focuses on the company's strategies and opinions regarding AI in this domain rather than documented operational practices.
relevant_sources.title: Why Is Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) the Best Self-Driving Technology Stock...

summary.overall_findings: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies' public disclosures detail governance practices, with patent documents describing the application of an AI neural network for vehicle speed management and its role in determining stopping distances. This evidence addresses governance as the sole pillar with documented practices, out of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Drawing from 8 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
